title: rubus × pallidiflorus
intro: Rubus × pallidiflorus, also known as the paleflower raspberry, is a hybrid plant species within the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × pallidiflorus include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Rubus × pallidiflorus are typically made from the leaves and roots, which can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions.
